jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
